data.content:
[plan-review] Approved.

- All 10 boundaries from knot acceptance are covered.
- All 5 classifier categories from knot acceptance are covered with
  unit tests.
- Hermetic Test Policy respected: unit tests use injected stubs (no
  real fs/exec), integration test goes in __manual_tests__/.
- File-size limit (500 LOC) respected: split into 4 small modules
  (dispatch-forensics-types.ts, dispatch-forensics-storage.ts,
  dispatch-forensics-classify.ts, dispatch-forensics.ts).
- Function-size limit (100 LOC) respected: each public function is
  small; classifier is rule-based diff, not one mega-function.
- Wiring is additive (no behavior change). Snapshot writes are
  fire-and-forget so they cannot block the take loop.
- Reuses existing red-banner machinery from dispatch-pool-resolver.ts
  (adds one exported helper) — no duplicated ANSI codes.
- New lease-audit event names are clearly distinct from existing
  events (prefix `beat_snapshot_`).
- Greppable marker phrase `FOOLERY DISPATCH FORENSIC` distinct from
  the existing `FOOLERY DISPATCH FAILURE`.
- Out-of-scope is explicit: no behavior fixes, no take-loop
  follow-up changes (those are foolery-2dd7).

Risk note for implementation: snapshot exec calls (showKnot, listLeases)
must use a 5s timeout to avoid blocking the take loop if kno hangs.

Approve and advance to implementation.
